ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crowdfunding_projects" (
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crowdfunding project */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the contact related to the project */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or entity launching the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Funding goal in monetary value */,
  "pledged" TEXT /* Amount pledged so far */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers who supported the project */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for funding */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was launched */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding period ends */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the project category */,
  "subcategory_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the project subcategory */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL of the project page on the platform */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's main image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's promotional video */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON string containing social media handles */,
  "total_rewards" INTEGER /* Total number of rewards offered by the project */,
  "average_pledge" TEXT /* Average pledge amount */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crowdfunding_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crowdfunding_projects_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crowdfunding_projects_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the contact person */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contact person */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the contact person */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the contact person */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip or postal code of the contact person */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category's icon or image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the subcategory's icon or image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "pledged_amount" TEXT /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the backer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the backer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the backer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip or postal code of the backer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the backer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the crowdfunding project */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the backer making the pledge */,
  "pledged_amount" TEXT /* Amount pledged */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date the pledge was made */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the reward associated with the pledge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pledge was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pledge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES crowdfunding_projects ("cf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the crowdfunding project */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "analytics" TEXT /* Detailed analytics information */,
  "funding_goal_achieved_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the funding goal achieved */,
  "number_of_rewards_claimed" INTEGER /* Number of rewards claimed by backers */,
  "total_rewards_sent" INTEGER /* Total number of rewards sent to backers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES crowdfunding_projects ("cf_id")
)
